title: Hydroelectric Plant Technicians
description: Monitor and control activities associated with hydropower generation. Operate plant equipment, such as turbines, pumps, valves, gates, fans, electric control boards, and battery banks. Monitor equipment operation and performance and make necessary adjustments to ensure optimal performance. Perform equipment maintenance and repair as necessary.

tasks.text: Monitor hydroelectric power plant equipment operation and performance, adjusting to performance specifications, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify or address malfunctions of hydroelectric plant operational equipment, such as generators, transformers, or turbines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start, adjust, or stop generating units, operating valves, gates, or auxiliary equipment in hydroelectric power generating plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform preventive or corrective containment or cleanup measures in hydroelectric plants to prevent environmental contamination.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect water-powered electric generators or auxiliary equipment in hydroelectric plants to verify proper operation or to determine maintenance or repair needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate status of hydroelectric operating equipment to dispatchers or supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate high voltage switches or related devices in hydropower stations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate hydroelectric plant equipment, such as turbines, pumps, valves, gates, fans, electric control boards, or battery banks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain or repair hydroelectric plant electrical, mechanical, or electronic equipment, such as motors, transformers, voltage regulators, generators, relays, battery systems, air compressors, sump pumps, gates, or valves.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement load or switching orders in hydroelectric plants, in accordance with specifications or instructions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install or calibrate electrical or mechanical equipment, such as motors, engines, switchboards, relays, switch gears, meters, pumps, hydraulics, or flood channels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Change oil, hydraulic fluid, or other lubricants to maintain condition of hydroelectric plant equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain logs, reports, work requests, or other records of work performed in hydroelectric plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Connect metal parts or components in hydroelectric plants by welding, soldering, riveting, tapping, bolting, bonding, or screwing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lift and move loads, using cranes, hoists, and rigging, to install or repair hydroelectric system equipment or infrastructure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform tunnel or field inspections of hydroelectric plant facilities or resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Splice or terminate cables or electrical wiring in hydroelectric plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test and repair or replace electrical equipment, such as circuit breakers, station batteries, cable trays, conduits, or control devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take readings and record data, such as water levels, temperatures, or flow rates.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Erect scaffolds, platforms, or hoisting frames to access hydroelectric plant machinery or infrastructure for repair or replacement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cut, bend, or shape metal for applications in hydroelectric plants, using equipment such as hydraulic benders or pipe threaders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
